Kidplokio Green Walking Robot Dinosaur Dragon Space Toys Lights Sounds, Boys

This Kidplokio Dinosaur Robot T-Rex Toy with Lights and Sounds will leave all other dinosaur toys trembling in their wake! With loud realistic roars, bright LED lights, as well as prehistoric stomps, this futuristic dinosaur robot walks all by itself with no assistance or remote control! (Batteries not included with purchase.)

Key Features

  • DINOSAUR ROBOT TOYS: This futuristic robot dinosaur from Kidplokio walks all by itself and comes with captivating lights and sounds too to make playtime even more fun and realistic! The t-rex toy quickly moves across smooth surfaces with rollers under its tail and feet
  • AWESOME LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: Kidplokio’s walking Space Robot Dinosaur comes with lifelike stomping sounds and bright flashing LED lights that illuminate in the colors, red, blue, and green inside the dinosaur’s eyes and mouth; When activated this fearsome apex predator strikes fear into anything nearby with its ferocious roar!
  • PRETEND PLAY: Perfect for any futuristic Jurassic journey into make-believe! The simple, easy-to-use design of the futuristic dinosaur robot allows toddlers and kids to engage with their prehistoric pal, as it moves forward unassisted to the next adventure! Batteries not included
  • CHILD DEVELOPMENT: Not only will your little paleontologist be thrilled and occupied for hours with these walking, light-up t-rex toys, but toddlers will also be engaging in important early educational growth, like working fine and gross motor skills, as well as improving cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 14.5 x 9.75 x 4 inches; Weight: 1.20lbs; Batteries: x2 AA Batteries Not Included; Colors: White or Green; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: LSTKPLRDSGW
  • UPC: 810058483713
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 14.5 in x 9.75 in x 4 in

Perfect for any futuristic Jurassic journey into make-believe! The simple, easy-to-use design of the dinosaur robot allows toddlers and kids to engage with their prehistoric pal as it moves forward unassisted, for endless hours of pretend play fun! The t-rex toys move easily across smooth surfaces with rollers under its tail and both feet, and feature stunning LED lights that illuminate in colors red, blue and green within the dinosaur’s eyes and mouth, making playtime even more fun and realistic!

Not only will your little paleontologist be thrilled and occupied for hours with this mechanical, light-up walking tyrannosaurus rex dinosaur robot from Kidplokio, but toddlers will also be engaging in important early educational growth, like working fine and gross motor skills, as well as improving cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions.

Available in green or white colorways (batteries are not included with purchase), the dinosaur robot toys come with an on/off button if quiet playtime is needed.
